error_signature: value in the node changes unexpectedly
title: Unexpected value change in Set node with JS expression
symptom: Using an assignment operator in a Set node's JS expression causes the underlying JSON value to change unexpectedly.
applies_when: Writing a JS expression to change a value
not_this_if: Using a Code node for complex logic
root_cause: In n8n's Set node, using the assignment operator '=' modifies the underlying JSON object instead of evaluating a condition. This leads to unintended changes in the data structure.
fix_steps: Test the output to ensure it behaves as expected
agent_instruction: Change the JS expression in the Set node to use a conditional operator instead of assignment.
